title: Inhibitors of Phosphoglycerate Dehydrogenase and Uses Thereof (2025)
filingInfo: Inhibitors of Phosphoglycerate Dehydrogenase and Uses Thereof (2025). Co-inventors with Fuad Al Abir, Md Delower Hossain, Zhandos Sembay, and Sixue Zhang. US patent application 61/359,429 filed in July 2025 by the University of Alabama at Birmingham.

title: Disease-specific Drug-protein Connectivity Mapping
filingInfo: Disease-specific Drug-protein Connectivity Mapping. Sole inventor. US patent application 61/359,429 filed in June 2010 by Indiana University. (Licensed to a commercial company in May 2013)

title: Multi-level Terrains as a Visual Analytic Platform for Discovery and Validation of Molecular Biomarkers
filingInfo: Multi-level Terrains as a Visual Analytic Platform for Discovery and Validation of Molecular Biomarkers. With Co-inventor Shiaofen Fang. US patent application 61/301,509 filed in March 2010 by Indiana University. (Licensed to a commercial company in May 2013)

title: 4-protein Biomarker Panel for the Diagnosis of Lymphoma from Biospecimen
filingInfo: 4-protein Biomarker Panel for the Diagnosis of Lymphoma from Biospecimen. Sole inventor. US patent application 61/301,520 filed in March 2010 by Indiana University. (Licensed to a commercial company in May 2013)

title: Mining Protein Interaction Networks
filingInfo: Mining Protein Interaction Networks. Sole inventor. US full patent application 11/526,938 filed on 09/26/2006 by Indiana University, Bloomington, IN. (Claims abandoned)

title: Computer Software for Sequence Selection
filingInfo: Computer Software for Sequence Selection. Co-inventors: Michael Mittmann and Hui Wang. US patent application 11/084,309 filed on 03/18/2005 by Affymetrix, Inc., Santa Clara, CA.

title: A Relational Database Operator to perform Biological Sequence Similarity Search
filingInfo: A Relational Database Operator to perform Biological Sequence Similarity Search. Sole inventor. US provisional patent Filed in Jan 2001 (not pursued due to financial reasons)
